name: Yannis Pappas
blurb: He first built an online following with his characters Mr. Panos and Maurica before establishing himself as a touring stand-up with the hour-long specials Blowing the Light (2019), Mom Love (2022), and Property Owner.
bio: Yannis Pappas is an American stand-up comedian from Brooklyn, New York, born to Greek parents. He first built an online following with his characters Mr. Panos and Maurica before establishing himself as a touring stand-up with the hour-long specials Blowing the Light (2019), Mom Love (2022), and Property Owner (2025). He co-hosts the History Hyenas podcast with Chris Distefano.

timeline.ev: Airs a Comedy Central Half Hour special

bits.yt_title: Girl Dad’s Love #Metoo | Yannis Pappas | Standup Comedy
